text: I feel a curious blend of anticipation and slight detachment in this modern, brightly-lit exhibition space. Its glass walls and colorful R+D display evoke thoughts about progress and innovation, yet I am also aware of the artificiality of the environment. The angular architecture and digital screens stimulate my intellect but keep my emotions at a measured distance. I find myself pondering the relationship between humans and technology, and how easily one can feel both engaged and isolated in such designed spaces.
